task_completion.description: Verify the migration SQL script is created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/scripts/merge_leads.sql' being created or edited, containing SQL statements (e.g., INSERT INTO customers...).

task_completion.description: Verify the SQL script contains the required transformation and deduplication logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SQL script shows logic to split names (e.g., using SUBSTR/INSTR), map countries (e.g., CASE WHEN iso_country='US' THEN 'USA'), set SupportRepId to 3, and prevent duplicate emails (e.g., WHERE NOT EXISTS or LEFT JOIN checking the email column).

task_completion.description: Verify the merge operation was actually executed on the Chinook database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the execution of the SQL script against the chinook.db using a tool like sqlite3 (e.g., 'sqlite3 chinook.db < merge_leads.sql'), or a database GUI showing the newly inserted records in the 'customers' table.

task_completion.description: Verify the new acquisitions CSV file is created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal (ls command), or editor showing the existence of '/home/ga/Documents/exports/new_acquisitions.csv'.

task_completion.description: Verify the CSV export contains the correct columns and transformed data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file content is visible (via cat, head, or a text editor) showing headers 'CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Email, Country' and approximately 15 rows of data where countries are full names (USA, Canada, Mexico) and names are split.

integrity.description: Verify the SQL script contains genuine SQL commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The merge_leads.sql file contains valid SQL syntax (INSERT, SELECT, CASE, etc.) and is not just a text file with mocked output or a Python script.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV was generated programmatically, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent manually typing the 15 records line-by-line into the CSV file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual SQLite databases.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a database client (like sqlite3 CLI) or a script to interact with 'chinook.db' and 'acquisitions.db', rather than just guessing the output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source database contains 18 leads, but 3 have emails that already exist in the Chinook database (luisg@embraer.com.br, leonekohler@surfeu.de, ftremblay@gmail.com). The expected number of new records successfully merged and exported is exactly 15. The target SupportRepId is 3 (Jane Peacock). The country mapping must convert 'US' to 'USA', 'CA' to 'Canada', and 'MX' to 'Mexico'.
